name: Beacon Hill Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Beat egg whites until foamy. Slowly add sugar, one tablespoon at a time, beating after each addition until stiff peaks form.
3. Stir in vinegar and vanilla extract.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto prepared baking sheets.
6. Bake for 10 minutes.
7. Using a spatula, remove meringues immediately and place on a wire rack to cool.
Makes 3 dozen.
